prompt: I just cloned our payments-api repo to /tmp/dbg-eval-0/payments-api. It's the service that handles card auth and refunds. Tag it 'payments' and 'card'. Please register it in the debug-jira repo registry.

connection array has exactly 2 entries (production and uat)
production has a quickwit source with id=47 and uid='pay9ldn3'
production has a metabase source with database='payments_prod'
uat has a quickwit source with id=48 and uid='pay9uat2'
